title: dolichos thorelii
intro: Dolichos thorelii, also known as Indian hygrophila or hygrophila, is a perennial herb native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. Dolichos thorelii is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Dolichos thorelii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of various ailments.
